name: Literature Overview
description: Produce a short, source-grounded overview of a research topic, method, or paper cluster.

inputs.description: Research topic, method, paper, or question to survey.
Maximum number of papers to include.
Optional recency window or publication range.

permissions.description: Read public papers, Hugging Face Papers pages, model cards, dataset cards, and repository metadata.

approval_points.description: Confirm the selected paper set before final synthesis.

phases.name: Scope
phases.objective: Define topic, inclusion criteria, exclusions, and target audience.

phases.name: Source Selection
phases.objective: Collect high-signal papers, model cards, dataset cards, and repositories with provenance links.

phases.name: Synthesis
phases.objective: Compare methods, datasets, claims, evals, limitations, and open questions.

phases.name: Delivery
phases.objective: Produce a concise overview with citations, caveats, and next-step recommendations.

required_outputs.description: Topic scope, audience, and inclusion criteria.
Selected papers, cards, repositories, dates, and links.
Comparison of methods, datasets, metrics, findings, and limitations.

artifacts.description: Claims mapped to sources and evidence strength.

verifiers.description: Topic, audience, and source inclusion criteria are explicit.
Every selected source has a URL, title, publication or update date when available, and source type.
Major claims map to paper, model card, dataset card, or repository sources.
Final recommendations and caveats are supported by the source table and claim matrix.
